publications.ref: Bubis JA, Arrey TN, Damoc E, Delanghe B, Slovakova J, Sommer TM, Kagawa H, Pichler P, Rivron N, Mechtler K, Matzinger M. Challenging the Astral mass analyzer to quantify up to 5,300 proteins per single cell at unseen accuracy to uncover cellular heterogeneity. Nat Methods. 2025 22(3):510-519

Characteristics[Organism].evidence: naive human pluripotent stem cells (epiblast) and trophectoderm-like cells

Characteristics[CellLine].evidence: we identify up to 7,400 protein groups from as little as 250 pg of HeLa cell peptides; we apply our workflow to A549 cells, yielding a proteome coverage ranging from 1,801 to a maximum of >5,300 protein groups

Characteristics[CellType].value: naive human pluripotent stem cells, trophectoderm-like cells
Characteristics[CellType].evidence: distinguish between in vitro analogs of two human blastocyst lineages: naive human pluripotent stem cells (epiblast) and trophectoderm-like cells

Characteristics[Label].evidence: Confirmed from PRIDE database: label-free quantification

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: Confirmed from PRIDE database: Data-independent acquisition, Bottom-up proteomics

Characteristics[OrganismPart].reasoning: A549 cells are lung adenocarcinoma cells, and the study mentions human blastocyst lineages
Characteristics[OrganismPart].needs: Confirmation of specific organ/tissue context for each cell type

Characteristics[Disease].reasoning: A549 is a well-known lung adenocarcinoma cell line, and PRIDE database confirms lung cancer
Characteristics[Disease].needs: Explicit disease context mention in methodology

Characteristics[DevelopmentalStage].reasoning: Study specifically mentions blastocyst lineages and cell cycle phase dependencies
Characteristics[DevelopmentalStage].needs: Clarification if this applies to all samples or specific experimental conditions

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: 論文は単一細胞プロテオミクスに焦点を当て、HeLaとA549細胞株を使用した実験を記述している。ヒト胚盤胞系統の細胞も含まれており、label-free quantificationとdata-independent acquisitionが使用されている。疾患コンテキストと特定の組織部位については追加確認が必要である。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: 3 ng µl–1 trypsin (Trypsin Gold, V5280, Promega)

Characteristics[Label].evidence: Label-free quantification confirmed from previous steps and no labeling reagents mentioned in sample preparation

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].reasoning: 100 µM 2-mercaptoethanol is mentioned in N2B27 basal medium formulation, but this appears to be for cell culture rather than protein sample preparation
Characteristics[ReductionReagent].needs: Clarification whether 2-mercaptoethanol was used for protein reduction or only in cell culture medium

Comment[Separation].reasoning: Aurora Ultimate TS 25-cm nanoflow UHPLC column with integrated emitter was used for peptide separation
Comment[Separation].needs: Confirmation of specific separation mechanism (likely reverse phase based on typical LC-MS setup)

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製では、トリプシン消化が確認され、アルキル化試薬は使用されていない（単一細胞検索でカルバミドメチル化が除外されている）。2-メルカプトエタノールが言及されているが、細胞培養用か還元試薬用かは不明確。分離にはnanoflow UHPLCが使用されているが、具体的な分離メカニズムの詳細は確認が必要。修飾、枯渇、スパイク化合物等の使用は確認されていない。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: Samples were analyzed using the Thermo Scientific Vanquish Neo UHPLC system... For MS measuring, the Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometer and the Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer (both Thermo Scientific) were coupled to the LC

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: For MS2 in DIA mode using the Astral analyzer... For MS2 in DIA mode, overlapping (m/z of 1) isolation windows

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: An electrospray voltage of 1.85 kV was applied for ionization and adopted to slightly higher voltages for aged emitters to ensure spray stability

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: For MS2 in DIA mode using the Astral analyzer

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: Peptide separation was performed at 30–80 SPD with details provided in Supplementary Table 1 and with all single-cell measurements performed at 50 SPD

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: Fast sample loading was performed at a maximum pressure of 1.4 × 108 Pa and at a maximum flow rate of 1 µl min–1

Comment[CollisionEnergy].reasoning: HCD fragmentation is confirmed but specific collision energy values are not mentioned in the methods section
Comment[CollisionEnergy].needs: Specific collision energy values or settings from instrument parameters

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].reasoning: High-resolution Orbitrap instruments typically use ppm tolerances, but specific values not stated
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].needs: Search parameters from Spectronaut analysis settings

Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].reasoning: Astral analyzer provides high mass accuracy but specific tolerance not mentioned
Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].needs: Fragment ion tolerance settings from data analysis parameters

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].reasoning: Trypsin digestion confirmed but missed cleavage allowance not specified in search parameters
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].needs: Spectronaut search settings for missed cleavages

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: 質量分析装置設定が詳細に確認された。Orbitrap AstralでのDIA取得、nanoESI、Astralアナライザーでの分析が確定。グラディエント時間は可変（30-80 SPD）で単一細胞測定は50 SPDで実施。衝突エネルギー、質量許容誤差、見逃し切断数については、Spectronaut解析パラメータからの追加確認が必要。

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: All filenames end with _1.raw, _2.raw, or _3.raw indicating three biological replicates for each concentration condition

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: Each peptide concentration level (50pg, 100pg, 150pg, 250pg, 500pg, 700pg, 1000pg, 2000pg, 5000pg, 10000pg) has three replicates indicated by _1, _2, _3 suffixes in filenames

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].evidence: Total of 30 raw files representing 10 different peptide concentrations × 3 biological replicates each

FactorValue[Compound].reasoning: All filenames contain 'HeLa' indicating HeLa cell peptide digests at various concentrations, and methods mention 'HeLa (Thermo Scientific, Pierce HeLa Protein Digest Standard, 88328)'
FactorValue[Compound].needs: Confirmation whether HeLa peptide digest should be considered as compound factor or sample type

FactorValue[ConcentrationOfCompound].1.reasoning: Filenames clearly indicate peptide amounts: 50pgHeLa, 100pgHeLa, etc. Methods mention 'HeLa or K562 cell peptides were dissolved in 0.1% TFA and 0.015% DDM at a concentration of 5 ng µl–1'
FactorValue[ConcentrationOfCompound].1.needs: Confirmation of units and whether this represents total amount injected or concentration

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: ファイル名解析により、HeLa細胞ペプチド標準品を用いた濃度依存性実験であることが確定。10段階の濃度条件（50pg-10000pg）で各3回の生物学的反復を実施し、計30サンプル。技術的反復やフラクション化は行われていない。ペプチド濃度がFactorValueとして扱われる可能性が高いが、単位と定義の確認が必要。
